stories: Geopolitics flips the tape risk‑off: US‑Israel strikes on Iran drive broad de‑risking
Oil: OPEC+ “token” April hike (+206k bpd) is ignored—Hormuz disruption duration is the price setter
Europe macro: Eurozone manufacturing PMI back in expansion (Germany also >50)
Emerging Asia growth pulse improves: Philippines PMI hits 8+ year high; Indonesia at 2‑year high
Japan rates: regional bank shifts into short JGBs, calls BOJ hike in April + ~6‑month cadence
Week‑ahead catalyst map: Iran headlines stay the #1 volatility input; US jobs data is the scheduled “macro gate”
Trade policy overhang: tariff uncertainty resurfaces as a parallel macro shock (separate from the war)
Uranium contracting signal: Cameco signs $2.6B long‑term supply deal with India (2027–2035)
Market‑structure/reg risk: Polymarket scrutiny deepens after ~71‑minute pre‑headline Iran strike bet (~$515K profit)
Wildcard (defense equity angle): drones as the signature weapon—AeroVironment ($AVAV) put in focus
